name: Hadron
description: Hadron — No-code desktop and mobile app builder with a drag-and-drop UI and built-in data sources.

seo.title: Hadron — No-code / Low-code App Builders
seo.meta_description: Hadron: Hadron — No-code desktop and mobile app builder with a drag-and-drop UI and built-in data sources.

when_to_use: Drag-and-drop no-code mobile app with built-in data sources
Desktop app prototype without native development skills
Quick internal tool MVP with a visual builder interface
Multi-platform app distributed without app store submission
No-code client project delivered with visual builder

pros: Targets both platforms from one project
review.verdict: Niche no-code builder in a crowded space — harder to justify over FlutterFlow or Bravo Studio.
review.best_for: Quick internal tool builders wanting desktop plus mobile from one drag-and-drop project
review.not_for: Teams needing strong community, extensibility, or clear product longevity

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium tier; no explicit peak-lock or reserved-capacity evidence.

lock_in.reason: No-code apps hard to migrate off platform
